violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item * was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Food items stored on the floor in the dry storage and walk in cooler areas.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment * that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Ice machine requires a cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Vent hood requires a cleaning.
